msg_summary: Bank of India Q4 Business Update: Global Business up 14.53% YoY
IndiGo February market share at 63.1% vs 63.6% in January
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise: CO approves establishment of multi-speciality hospital at Dwarka, New Delhi
NCLT approves composite scheme of arrangement involving Apollo Healthco, Keimed, and Apollo Healthtech
Loans & Advances grew 20% YoY to ₹2,90,362 crores, Customer Deposits increased 17.2% YoY to ₹2,84,327 crores
Retail disbursements of ~₹24,080 crores for Q4 FY26, up 62% Y-O-Y, Retail loan book grows to ~₹1,19,550 crores, up 26% Y-O-Y
Record production numbers for Q4 and FY26, highest ever annual aluminium and alumina production, Q4 silver production up 11% QoQ
L&T Finance reports retail disbursements of ~₹24,080 crores for Q4 FY26, up 62% Y-O-Y
Bank of India global business up 14.5% Y-O-Y to ₹16.98 lakh cr, deposits up 13.6%, advances up 15.7%
Indian Bank total business up 13.1% to ₹14.98 lakh cr, deposits up 12.6%, advances up 13.6%
